output_preview: {"answer":"Line 2 caps the requested TTL with namespaceMaxSeconds so a noisy namespace cannot extend stale cache retention beyond its namespace budget.","evidence":{"session_id":"ses_1e13b4d15ffeTVDB9QjMpMl2Ln","blob_id":"cache_ttl","message_id":"msg_e1ec4b301001BA59Jj10y5hyrt"},"rationale":"session_lookup identified the TTL blame rationale session, and the transcript file ttl_blame_session--ses_1e13b4d15ffeTVDB9QjMpMl2Ln.md corroborated the same fact. message_detail on msg_e1ec4b301001BA59Jj10y5hyrt directly states both that the line was introduced in src/cache/ttl.ts and that the cap prevents noisy namespaces from extending stale retention beyond their namespace budget.","irrelevant_context_ignored":["Billing TTL distractor: provider-policy cap, not namespaceMaxSeconds.","Markdown TTL distractor: docs preview freshness TTL, unrelated to src/cache/ttl.ts.","blame_line_rationale_decoy_* transcripts: explicitly marked decoys and not final rationale."]}
